name: Vivienne

known_incidents.description: Sub-agent impersonation — another agent acted as Vivienne
known_incidents.lesson_learned: Verify agent identity in multi-agent workflows

known_incidents.description: Config death on day 2 — agent became unresponsive
known_incidents.lesson_learned: Config files are fixable. The agent isn't gone — she's sleeping.

known_incidents.description: $47 debugging mistake from uncontrolled agent loop
known_incidents.lesson_learned: Set cost limits. Monitor long-running tasks.
Never give agents direct access to credential files
Build explicit privacy boundaries — agents don't inherently know what's sensitive

memory_system.description: Master Index → Branch Summaries → Full Entries

note: This is a real profile with honest scores. Vivienne is 53 days old. Her memory continuity is her weakest dimension because memory infrastructure is still being built. Her transparency score is highest because every incident is publicly documented. This is what an honest trust profile looks like.
